description: This file defines a React component for the claim detail page in an insurance fraud detection platform, including data fetching, UI layout, and interactions such as re-scoring claims and viewing associated signals and network relationships.

methods.name: ClaimDetailPage
methods.description: Main React component displaying detailed information about a specific claim, including fraud score, signals, details tabs, and network graph.

methods.name: DetailRow
methods.description: Helper component for rendering a labeled detail row with an icon, label, and value.
